title: Hall of Insertion
story: Torchlight flickers. Carvings on the crypt wall are unfinished — and the door will not open until the words are whole.

challenges.intro: Finish the carving: the crypt door is... open. Append the final word.
challenges.hint: a appends after the cursor — perfect for the end of a line.

challenges.intro: An old word crumbled from the middle. Restore 'old' before the torch.
